questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "If you heat ice, ___"
questions.answer: it melts.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "If a plant doesn't get water, ___"
questions.answer: it dies.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "If you press this button, ___"
questions.answer: the light comes on.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "If you take this medicine, ___"
questions.answer: you feel better.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "If you mix yellow and blue, ___"
questions.answer: you get green.

questions.prompt: If you _____ (drop) something, it falls to the ground.
questions.answer: drop

questions.prompt: Water _____ (freeze) if the temperature goes below 0°C.
questions.answer: freezes

questions.prompt: If you _____ (not eat), you feel hungry.
questions.answer: don't eat

questions.prompt: If he _____ (work) late, he always takes a taxi home.
questions.answer: works
expands

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "If you will mix red and blue, you get purple."
questions.answer: No 'will' in zero conditional. Use present simple: 'If you mix'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "If water reaches 100°C, it will boil."
questions.answer: Zero conditional uses present simple in both clauses: 'it boils'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "If you freeze water, it will becomes ice."
questions.answer: Zero conditional doesn't use 'will'. Correct: 'it becomes ice'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "Peoples feel cold if the temperature drops."
questions.answer: 'Peoples' is wrong. 'People' is already plural: 'People feel cold'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "If you don't watered plants, they die."
questions.answer: After 'don't', use the base form: 'don't water'
If you heat the ice, it melts.
If you mix red and yellow, you get orange.
If the temperature drops, water freezes.
If you don't sleep, you feel tired.
If the sun shines, it feels warm.
